corrections.reason: Active greenfield release in Playford LGA

Casey LGA greenfield releases in Clyde/Clyde North

lessonsLearned: Outer Adelaide fringe (Gawler/Two Wells/Smithfield) has massive supply pipeline — cap growth expectations
REIWA WA works via curl but rate limits after ~5 suburbs — stagger 1.5s between requests
Ray White local agent sites are the backdoor for QLD/SA/VIC — not blocked like Domain/REA
Always read full listing description for red flags BEFORE recommending INVESTIGATE
Corner blocks in R40 zones are highest value-add — prioritize these
Established inner/middle suburbs > outer greenfield fringe for capital growth
QLD land tax on 2nd property ~$1,500/yr is trivial vs 28% growth — don't over-weight this risk

scoringAdjustments.rule: If suburb has >2000 new dwellings within 5km, cap growth forecast at 5%/yr max
If listing mentions 'sold as is' OR 'mould' OR 'asbestos' OR 'termite', auto-AVOID
Corner blocks in R30/R40/R60 zones score +20 bonus in value-add ranking
Established suburbs (infill only) preferred over outer greenfield fringe
Post-spike suburbs (>20% growth in last 12mo) get MEDIUM cycle risk automatically
